name: shinden-to-anilist
description: Desktop tool for exporting Shinden lists into AniList-compatible data.
author: Kacper Kondracki

scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:45187 && SHINDEN_TO_ANILIST_ELECTRON_DEV=1 SHINDEN_TO_ANILIST_RENDERER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4173 SHINDEN_TO_ANILIST_GRPC_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:45187 pnpm --filter electron dev
scripts.build:electron:linux: pnpm build:frontend && pnpm build:electron && pnpm build:grpc:linux && pnpm build:icons:electron
scripts.build:tauri:windows: pnpm build:icons:tauri && pnpm --filter tauri build && node scripts/stage-tauri-windows.mjs
scripts.package:linux:appimage:bundled: node scripts/stage-sidecar.mjs linux && pnpm --filter electron exec electron-builder --linux AppImage
scripts.export:linux: pnpm build:electron:linux && pnpm package:linux:appimage:system && pnpm package:linux:appimage:bundled
scripts.format:root: prettier --config prettier.config.mjs --ignore-path .prettierignore --write package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml prettier.config.mjs prettier.base.mjs scripts .github
scripts.format: pnpm format:crates && pnpm format:root && pnpm format:frontend && pnpm format:electron && pnpm format:tauri
